scripts.install:wasm: bash -lc 'scripts/ensure-emsdk.sh && source ./emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/cmake/Modules/Platform/Emscripten.cmake && cmake --build build --target cp_sat_api -j'
scripts.install: npm run install:ts && npm run install:wasm && npm run ts:check
